description: Annotation of a sub-string within rich text.

main.description: Annotation of a sub-string within rich text.

features.description: The feature types applied to this text range (e.g. link, mention, formatting).

mention.description: Facet feature for mention of another account.

link.description: Facet feature for a URL link.

bold.description: Facet feature for bold text formatting. Spec candidate per Paul Frazee.

italic.description: Facet feature for italic text formatting. Spec candidate per Paul Frazee.

underline.description: Facet feature for underline text formatting. Spec candidate per Paul Frazee.

strikethrough.description: Facet feature for strikethrough text formatting. Spec candidate per Paul Frazee.

byteSlice.description: Specifies a sub-string in a utf-8 string by byte index.
